creator: gnikl@justmail.de
text: When looking at the github mirror of FreeBSD I noticed that the chromium repository got a v96 branch. That branch contains a commit (https://github.com/freebsd/chromium/commit/a69925c) fixing the issue described in this bug report. As suggested in comment #27 that commit removes a patch from the files/ directory. That change was made on the v94 branch on October 22.
